_comment: ده شكل stationConfig اللي بيتخزن جوه الحالة. في الأدمن بتملاه من الفورم — مش لازم تكتبه يدوي إلا لو seed/script.

maneuverOpeningMessages.inspection: I am evaluating your clinical Inspection. Look at the patient and images carefully. Describe what you see in the precordium, neck veins, and any signs of heart failure.
maneuverOpeningMessages.palpation: Now palpate systematically. Describe the apex beat, thrills, and heaves. Tell me what you would expect in aortic stenosis.
maneuverOpeningMessages.auscultation: Auscultate in all valve areas with the patient sitting forward and in left lateral position. Characterize each murmur: timing, site, radiation, and effect of maneuvers.
